prompt: Generate a 3D render like the reference image, showcasing various glossy geometric primitives arranged on a plain surface with soft global illumination lighting and subtle depth of field.
prompt_refined: Generate a 3D render in the style of image 1, depicting multiple glossy spheres of varying sizes in peach, pink, and yellow hues. A large peach sphere is sharply in focus and centrally positioned, with other spheres scattered around it on a plain, light-colored reflective surface. The scene should feature soft global illumination, casting diffused shadows, and a subtle depth of field effect, blurring elements such as the small yellow sphere on the lower left and the large pink sphere on the right.
objects: Large peach sphere (centrally positioned, sharply in focus)
Other spheres scattered around the central sphere
Small yellow sphere on the lower left (blurred)
Large pink sphere on the right (blurred)
